zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Poole于1460年出生。她于1480年与Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf在英国英格兰藍卡爾度波利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在英国英格兰藍卡爾度波利享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Poole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pol(e), polle, poul(e) ‘pool, pond’ (Old English pōl). The name may be topographic, for someone who lived by a pool, or habitative, from a place so named.
Possibly an Americanized form of German Puhl or Pfuhl(e) (see Pool 4).

variants.name: Pool
meanings: English: variant of   Poole   or   Paul  .
Jewish (from the Netherlands) and Dutch: ethnic name for someone from Poland.

variants.name: Pooler
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): topographic name for someone who lived near a pool, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with this word (see   Poole  ).
Americanized form of French   Poulin   ‘young animal, colt’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of German Pfuhler, a variant of Pfuhl + -er, suffix denoting an inhabitant.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Poole was born in 1460. She married Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf in 1480, in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1490, in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Poole est née en 1460. Elle a épousé Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf en 1480, à Duxbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Duxbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Poole wurde 1460 geboren. Sie hat 1480 in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Poole(은)는 1460년 태어났다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 드스버이에서 Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 드스버이에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.
